The updated design features a shorter handle and wider‚Å£ face for an expanded sweet spot, giving you‚Äã more accuracy and control over‚Äç your shots.‚Äã The 14mm core width is ideal for players who value both power and touch, making ‚Äãit a versatile choice for any ‚Äãplaying ‚Å£style. Plus, every CRBN paddle comes with a Neoprene Paddle ‚ÄãCover to keep it protected and looking like new.

The foam-injected walls provide a‚Äå unibody construction, ensuring durability and a ‚Å¢nimble‚Äå feel on ‚Å¢the ‚Å§court.   • Foam-injected walls for durability and a unibody‚Äç construction
